embedding_text: I have designed, built, and shipped a production ranking and retrieval pipeline that serves millions of recruiter and candidate queries daily. I audited legacy BM25 systems, replaced them with a hybrid dense‑sparse retrieval architecture, and deployed an embeddings‑based ranker that improved recruiter click‑through rate by 23% in A/B tests. I managed embedding drift, performed nightly index refreshes, and maintained vector search infrastructure on a managed vector database, ensuring sub‑100 ms p99 latency at 10 M+ queries per day. I created end‑to‑end evaluation frameworks, defining offline NDCG@10, MRR, and MAP metrics and correlating them with online A/B results, leading to data‑driven iteration cycles. I wrote production‑grade Python code, integrated LLM re‑ranking via fine‑tuned models, and mentored a growing team of engineers while collaborating closely with product managers on recruiter‑experience features.
role_summary: The Senior AI Engineer owns Redrob's intelligence layer, building and iterating on ranking, retrieval, and matching systems that power recruiter and candidate search. They audit existing pipelines, ship improved models quickly, and establish rigorous offline and online evaluation to drive product impact.
hard_requirements: Shipped a production embeddings‑based retrieval system to real users, handling embedding drift, index refreshes, and quality regression in a live environment
Operated vector database or hybrid search infrastructure at scale (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, OpenSearch, Elasticsearch, FAISS) with production reliability
Delivered production‑grade Python code for core ranking components, demonstrating strong code quality and maintainability
Designed and implemented rigorous evaluation frameworks for ranking systems, including offline NDCG, MRR, MAP metrics and online A/B test analysis
nice_to_have_requirements: Fine‑tuned large language models using LoRA, QLoRA, or PEFT for re‑ranking or query augmentation
Built learning‑to‑rank models using XGBoost or neural approaches
Worked on HR‑tech, recruiting platforms, or marketplace products
Background in distributed systems or large‑scale inference optimization
Contributed open‑source projects in the AI/ML ecosystem
disqualifier_patterns: Career spent entirely in academic or pure research labs with no production deployment experience
Recent (under 12 months) AI work limited to using LangChain to call hosted LLM APIs without prior pre‑LLM retrieval or ranking production experience
Senior engineer who has not written production code in the last 18 months, focusing only on architecture or tech‑lead responsibilities
Career trajectory of rapid title‑chasing with company changes every ~1.5 years, indicating intent to leave within 3 years
Primary experience at consulting firms (e.g., TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini) without prior product‑company engineering roles
Specialization in computer vision, speech, or robotics with little to no NLP/IR exposure
preferred_location: Pune or Noida, India (open to other Tier‑1 Indian cities; relocation possible)
notice_preference: Prefer sub‑30‑day notice; can buy out up to 30 days; candidates with >30‑day notice still considered but with higher bar
evaluation_guidance: Prioritize candidates who have demonstrable production experience building and shipping embedding‑based retrieval or ranking systems at scale, with concrete evaluation metrics and Python code quality. Nice‑to‑have items only boost the score after all hard requirements are satisfied. Disqualify any profile that lacks production deployment, relies solely on recent LangChain demos, shows a pattern of rapid title‑chasing, or is limited to consulting or pure research roles.
